data.title: About
data.content:
## About This Site

This is a static site built with the **webhouse.app** CMS boilerplate. It demonstrates:

- Richtext content with markdown
- Block-based page sections (hero, features, CTA)
- Blog posts with tags, excerpts, and cover images
- OpenStreetMap embeds
- SEO metadata and JSON-LD structured data
- Dark mode support via `prefers-color-scheme`
- WebP image optimization

## How It Works

1. Content is stored as JSON files in `content/`
2. `build.ts` reads the JSON and generates static HTML
3. Run `npx tsx build.ts` to build
4. Deploy the `dist/` folder anywhere

## Stack

| Component | Technology |
|-----------|------------|
| CMS | webhouse.app |
| Build | TypeScript (tsx) |
| Styling | Inline CSS (no framework) |
| Maps | OpenStreetMap + Leaflet |
| Images | WebP variants via Sharp |

_seo.metaDescription: Learn about this static site built with the webhouse.app CMS boilerplate.
